name: Sunvim Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Sunvim Group Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells home textile products primarily in China. Its home textile products comprise towels, bedding and decorative articles, and furnishing fabrics. The company exports its products to Asia, Europe, the United States, and Australia, as well as to various countries and regions, including the Middle East and South Africa under the Sunvim brand. It also provides real estate services; supplies gas to approximately 300 industrial users, as well as centralized heating for residents and public facilities in Gaomi; and produces, sells, and services water for industrial and human consumption. In addition, the company operates an online shop. Sunvim Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1987 and is based in Gaomi, China.
